violations.text: Utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

Crab Salad was observed held at 61 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

Pork was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Pork was 21 degrees Fahrenheit and moved to prep sink with running water. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024
Establishment is lacking allergen statement. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

Soap and paper towels were not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegetables, sauces) in the reach in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
Unable to wash, rinse and sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Knives were stored on an unclean surface (behind three bay sink) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quaternary Ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
Sewage observed overflowing from grease trap. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The walls in the mop sink area and kitchen entryway are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023
The wall in the 3 bay sink area is in poor repair with exposed wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
The hand-washing sink in the retail service line was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quaternary Ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

The walls in the mop sink area and kitchen entryway are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023
